entry.title: Forever in debt to priceless advice
entry.summary:
Author: capricious_Bastard

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,431Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 21

Summary: There's a hush that befalls the city. Time has stopped for a moment as the big screens at Gotham Square flicker. Like a corrupted tape that's been stitched and Frankenstein-ed together. And they all watch as their heart falls.

entry.title: Love Me For Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,653Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 17

Summary: Bruce Wayne died destroying a Xenomorph Queen. Clark Kent mourned him with Kryptonian ritual and carried the key to the Batcave against his sternum for nine days. Then Jason Todd brought Bruce back. Resurrection via Lazarus Pit is never clean. Bruce returns with his memories intact and a rage that displaces every other emotion. The two-meter distance that kept Clark alive in the hive becomes the boundary that keeps Bruce from violence. The team fractures over the ethics of resurrection without consent. And in the Pacific Northwest, something new is hunting—parasitic neural infiltrators that enter through the ear canal and leave their hosts conscious during control. Bruce volunteers as bait. Clark shadows him every meter. The key stays cold against Clark's chest. And somewhere in the Cascade Range, a Yautja marks Batman as worthy prey. "You were wrong to do it. But I'm glad you did." Love that persists despite impossibility. Love that consumes despite resistance. Love that exists in darkness and is overcome by forces larger than itself. This is what remains.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 221,339Chapters: 42/?Kudos: 396

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

entry.title: What You Don't Know
entry.summary:
Author: NoodleDragon324

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,009Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 48

Summary: Inspired by the movie In & Out(1997) Smallville, Kansas: a sunny Midwestern town where everyone knows everyone and the wedding of a beloved local high school English teacher, Clark Kent, feels like national news. Clark couldn't be happier here, living with his soon-to-be wife and getting to see his best friend, Bruce, every day at a job that he loves. Nothing else in the world seems to matter when you have it all right here, but it certainly feels like the whole world is watching when Clark's former student gives an interview to hundreds of millions of people telling them that Clark is gay, just three days before his wedding.

entry.title: stab at faith
entry.summary:
Author: babybluecontinental

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,037Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Clark Kent needs a new job. Disabled, reclusive, and depressed billionaire Bruce Wayne needs a friend, though he’d never admit it. Alfred Pennyworth thinks the two should live together so they both get what they need and so he can finally retire. They get more.

entry.title: oh baby i am a wreck when i'm without you (i need you here to stay)
entry.summary:
Author: snapdragonsuplex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,176Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 222

Summary: “I… actually came down here to talk to you about something.” Bruce bites back a snarky comment about how it apparently wasn’t his doomscrolling; that would be unhelpful. “Do you still want to talk about it?” He asks, typing in a few notes. “I… yeah, I do.” “Alright. Go ahead.” He hears Clark take a breath behind him. “I think maybe we should think about giving the Kryptonite to someone else.” Bruce’s fingers freeze against the keyboard. ---------------- Clark and Bruce have their first major fight as a couple. Later, they work things out.

entry.title: This was not part of the VIP package
entry.summary:
Author: ThatStupidTheAlien

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,204Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 77

Summary: Bruce Wayne just wanted to be a good dad (and never be called an old man). What he didn't expect was to spend over $100,000 on a WWE VIP experience, survive a weekend in Vegas with three overly excited kids… and end up being the landing zone for his kids' favorite wrestler. Superman, the King of the Air, is used to calculating every jump with precision—until he misses and ends up falling right on top of Bruce Wayne. Between the lights, the matches, the autograph signings (and a Jason Todd on the verge of a breakdown after meeting Rhea Ripley), Bruce begins to discover that perhaps the most unexpected thing about the whole trip wasn't the fall… but the person who landed on him, which was definitely not part of the itinerary, much less the VIP package.

entry.title: Second time is the charm
entry.summary:
Author: Emelian65

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,654Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 418

Summary: Clark wakes up in his bed, feeling strange. He had vivid dreams of a cataclysmic future. He sits up, tries to shake it off, but the memories are too detailed, overwhelming. He remembers the world ending, heroes falling, his own death? But then he's alive, young. He checks the date... It's now 2011, several years in the past.

entry.title: The Detective’s Greatest Blindspot
entry.summary:
Author: Tigerphoenix

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,240Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 150

Summary: While he just wants Superman to stay on his side of the bay, Bruce encounters reporter Clark Kent at a gala, who calls Bruce out on his "Brucie" act. What starts as a tense "what are you hiding?" case turns into a genuine connection, where Bruce is so convinced that Clark Kent and the alien savior of Metropolis could never be the same person, he misses Clark's biggest secret. Then disaster strikes. In a Superman fight, the Daily Planet is destroyed, and witnesses say Clark was inside. Clark is dead—Superman's negligence killed him—and it has turned the Bat into a hunter, looking for a way to make the god pay for killing the best man he had ever known.

entry.title: The not so Super, SuperBat
entry.summary:
Author: TotallyaWayne

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,673Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 24

Summary: Bruce Wayne knew the rules of Gotham’s upper class at this point. Smile. Wave. Attend fancy parties. All so the rich can be okay with funding ‘save the world’ projects. Like his own projects, his company has been working tirelessly on. Projects he needed to be in good graces with the public for. Yes, Bruce knew Gotham’s socialite class well. But Metropolis? Their social scene was a mystery to him. Orrrrr Bruce takes his two kids to gala and things sure do wrong. Bruce and Clark have some Bi panic!!!!

entry.title: Worst Case Scenario
entry.summary:
Author: StarsSingYourName

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,777Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 13

Summary: Clark and Bruce are trying to find a way to work together, with the Justice League fighting all sorts of … unconventional villains. When Poison Ivy arrives on the scene, Bruce makes them sign a form of whom they’d want to be with if exposed to her sex pollen. Clark agrees to be Bruce’s partner, but when Bruce is actually exposed, he finds that having sex with your nemesis-turned-boss doesn’t come without its consequences.

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part Three
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,839Chapters: 4/15Kudos: 6

Summary: The Silax treatment is ready, but the cure is no simple rescue. To silence the queen inside him, Aven must let the inhibitor fail, wake the thing Weyland-Yutani built him to carry, and trust Bruce, Clark, Amanda, his brothers, and the children he left behind to keep him alive through the worst of it. For the first time, everyone is in the same room. Secrets come out. Old wounds split open. Family stops being something Aven can protect from a distance and becomes the only reason he can face what comes next. But beyond the Fortress, LexCorp’s stolen files reveal that Weyland’s work has not stopped with Aven. The procedure may end one nightmare. It may also uncover the next. (God, I really suck at summaries lmao)
